title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 349.085 - Notes and bonds declared to be approved investments for fiduciaries
text:
349.085.  Notes and bonds declared to be approved investments for fiduciaries. — The notes and bonds of the corporation are securities in which all public officers and bodies of this state and all municipalities and municipal subdivisions, all insurance companies and associations and other persons carrying on an insurance business, all banks, trust companies, savings associations, savings and loan associations, investment companies, all administrators, guardians, executors, trustees, and other fiduciaries, and all other persons whatsoever who are now or may hereafter be authorized to invest in bonds or other obligations of the state, may properly and legally invest funds, including capital, in their control or belonging to them.
(L. 1977 S.B. 267 § 16)
